summary_of_findings: STATE GRID CORPORATION OF CHINA presents an high overall risk profile, prominent government relationship extent paired with major economic restrictions exposure constraining financial transactions, while significant politically exposed person connections in addition to medium corporate image status tarnishing industry standing. The risk assessment also detected balanced controversial news presence along with standard fraud risk management undermining ethical standards. Additional indicators shows, our research could not verify an official web presence for this supplier. Moreover, our examination found notable cyber vulnerability indicators requiring oversight. The findings indicate a need for significant risk reduction strategies and close oversight.
sanctions_summary:
There are 1 sanction events for the organisation. The findings have been since 2024. Some of the most recent sanctions events include:
- In 2024, State Grid Corporation of China: Chinanews.com listed an article on 24 June 2024, re: Shan Yecai, Assistant to the General Manager of State Grid Corporation of China was under investigation for violation of law and regulations.
anti_summary:
There are 1 Bribery, Corruption, or Fraud findings for the organisation. The findings has been since 2016. Some of the most recent findings include:
- In 2016, Legal.people.com.cn listed an article on 18 January 2016, re: Deng Yonghui, former party secretary of State Grid Corporation of China was sentenced to 10 years in jail for taking 4,560,000 Yuan RMB bribes.
